title: Brachytropis microphylla
taxonomy: Brachytropis microphylla belongs to the family of flowering plants, and more specifically, it falls under the category of monocots. It is a species of flowering plant that is classified within the order Poales. The plant's classification further includes its family as the Restionaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as restio plants. The species is native to Australia and New Zealand, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its native environment. Brachytropis microphylla's classification is a vital tool in understanding its evolution, growth habits, and ecological importance.
